scripts.db:generate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- pnpm --filter @ticketbot/database exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- pnpm --filter @ticketbot/database exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- pnpm --filter @ticketbot/database exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- pnpm --filter @ticketbot/database exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- pnpm --filter @ticketbot/database exec prisma studio
scripts.db:dev-reset: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- pnpm --filter @ticketbot/database exec tsx prisma/dev-reset.ts
